data.description:
## What
Port ticket-list-epics.sh (~453 LOC) to Python behind REBAR_COMPUTE — the smallest Tier C compute script, the pattern-setter for the tier. Lists open epics with --all/--has-tag/--min-children filters, ordering over replayed state.

Files: rebar._reads or rebar._commands (the list-epics body), src/rebar/_engine/rebar (list-epics arm switch-wire), library list_epics.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] list-epics ported, REBAR_COMPUTE-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Ordering + filter (--all/--has-tag/--min-children) parity pinned by a golden matrix
- [ ] Its bash suite dual-run green (bash AND python, byte-identical)
- [ ] Default stays bash
data.title: Tier C: port list-epics (ticket-list-epics.sh ~453 LOC) to Python behind REBAR_COMPUTE
